category_sources: Official docs describe Schemathesis as property-based API testing for OpenAPI and GraphQL schemas.
source_facts.description says it is a testing tool for web applications with specs.
display_name_sources: Official site and repository use the display name Schemathesis.
docs_sources: Official project site links users to documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the dedicated official Read the Docs documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Read the Docs project and official GitHub repository identify https://github.com/schemathesis/schemathesis.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include testing, API, GraphQL, CLI, Swagger, OpenAPI, pytest, property-based-testing, fuzzing, and Hypothesis.
Official documentation describes OpenAPI and GraphQL API testing.
